# McpClient.GetSubscription method

Returns the active [`Subscription`](../../Stackific.Mcp.Protocol/Subscription.md) with *subscriptionId*, or `null` (spec §10.7).

```csharp
public Subscription? GetSubscription(string subscriptionId)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| subscriptionId | The subscription id. |

## Return Value

The subscription, or `null` when not active.
